changelog: v4.0.0: Redesigned home page with visual 1-2-3 workflow (Detect > Automate > Guide), bottleneck-driven Recommended Steps card, and above-the-fold layout. Scripts now show a scope summary before running. New drift detection system alerts when tweaks have been undone. RTX 50 series HAGS/DLSS 4 support. Renamed Tuning Priority to Bottleneck Analysis and FAST Score to FAST Benchmark. HWID collision fix (SMBIOS UUID + MachineGuid). iGPU/dGPU fix for Optimus laptops. Storage guidance, script safety improvements, new UI guidance sections. Fortnite FPS sync and energy-saving toggles.
